businessIntent.statement: Create a baseline for the deterministic screenshot library for the built-in surface library.
businessIntent.desiredOutcome: Create a baseline for the deterministic screenshot library for the built-in surface library.

acceptanceCriteria.description: Intent is translated into executable work for intent-poc-app.
Evidence is captured and packaged for review.
Results are packaged so they can be distributed consistently, with the desired outcome of: Create a baseline for the deterministic screenshot library for the built-in surface library..

scenarios.title: Intent is translated into acceptance-ready work
scenarios.goal: Turn the raw business statement into reviewable BDD structure.
given: A business intent has been captured: Create a baseline for the deterministic screenshot library for the built-in surface library.
The desired outcome is explicit: Create a baseline for the deterministic screenshot library for the built-in surface library.
when: The planner decomposes the intent into acceptance criteria and scenarios.
Applicable sources and destinations are identified from the prompt and configuration.
then: Intent is translated into executable work for intent-poc-app.
Evidence is captured and packaged for review.

scenarios.title: Behavior is verified visually for applicable sources
scenarios.goal: Define Playwright screenshot verification that QA can execute to validate behavior for each source involved in the intent.
given: Source intent-poc-app is available for execution.
when: TDD planning prepares Playwright screenshot verification for the applicable sources.
The runner maps the requested behavior into QA-runnable visual checkpoints.
then: QA can run a Playwright screenshot flow to verify behavior for intent-poc-app.
Each applicable source has executable visual verification coverage with reviewable screenshots.

scenarios.title: Results are distributed consistently
scenarios.goal: Make the outputs visible in the places that matter to stakeholders.
given: Execution produces evidence, summaries, and progress state.
Distribution destinations are known before execution begins.
when: The run reaches the distribution stage.
Publishing destinations receive the resulting evidence and summaries.
then: Stakeholders can inspect the outcome through a consistent package tied to the intent.
Distribution remains decoupled from any single source-specific workflow.

notes: Use this source for prompt-planning, Studio changes, and built-in surface library evidence.

Configured visual captures across linked sources: 48.

pathHints.reason: Primary implementation path for Surface Library.
Primary implementation path for Surface Library.

verificationHints.note: Stateful UI bugs should declare and verify the requested UI state before screenshot evidence is trusted.
verificationHints.reason: Matched prompt terms: screenshot, Surface Library, surface, library.

verificationHints.note: Prefer reusable state activation contracts over prompt-specific routing or one-off checkpoint logic.
verificationHints.reason: Matched prompt terms: Surface Library, surface, library.

verificationHints.note: Theme-sensitive UI bugs require paired light-mode and dark-mode screenshot evidence; do not accept a dark-mode-only capture set.
verificationHints.reason: Matched prompt terms: screenshot, Surface Library, surface, library.

repoNoteHints.note: Use this source for prompt-planning, Studio changes, and built-in surface library evidence.
repoNoteHints.reason: Matched prompt terms: built-in, surface, library, Surface Library.

repoNoteHints.note: Surface library screenshot regeneration routes through this source with an explicit library publish opt-in.
repoNoteHints.reason: Matched prompt terms: surface, library, screenshot, Surface Library.

repoMemoryHints.title: Demo Runtime
repoMemoryHints.note: /library stays a stable screenshot surface and should reuse shared render layers.
repoMemoryHints.reason: Matched repo memory terms: library, screenshot.

repoMemoryHints.title: Artifact Contract
repoMemoryHints.note: Persistent artifacts live under artifacts/business, artifacts/sources/<sourceId>, and artifacts/library/<sourceId>.
repoMemoryHints.reason: Matched repo memory terms: library, baseline.

plannerSections.title: IDD Plan
plannerSections.summary: Planner-owned business plan with acceptance criteria, repo context, execution lanes, and delivery notes.

plannerSections.title: IDD Source Lane: intent-poc-app
plannerSections.summary: Planner-owned lane for intent-poc-app, intended for downstream implementation and verification handoff.

sources.selectionReason: Source intent-poc-app was selected in the requested source scope.

destinations.label: Controller artifacts
destinations.reason: Local evidence bundles are always written by the controller.
details: Stores plan, manifests, logs, captures, and summaries on disk.

destinations.label: Linear parent issue
destinations.reason: Linear is the preferred destination for the BDD/TDD plan, but it is currently disabled in config.
details: Carries the business intent, acceptance criteria, scenarios, work items, and execution updates.
Enable config.linear.enabled to publish automatically.

destinations.label: Source workspace publication
destinations.reason: Workspace publishing is disabled until artifacts.storageMode is set to 'both'.
details: Useful when evidence should live beside the source repository.

tools.label: Linear-first scoping
tools.reason: The runner creates resumable Linear business and source lanes before the detailed planner pass expands BDD and TDD output.
details: Detailed planner output is written back onto the same parent and source-lane issues after scoping completes.

tools.label: BDD planning
tools.reason: The system converts the raw prompt into reviewable acceptance criteria and scenarios after Linear scoping completes.
details: Deterministic by default, with optional Gemini refinement when configured.

tools.label: Playwright TDD generation
tools.reason: Applicable sources now produce Playwright-first executable test plans and checkpoint screenshots.
details: Generated specs are intended for checked-in repo storage with overwrite semantics.

tools.label: Visual verification
tools.reason: Applicable sources currently expose visual checkpoints and capture definitions.
details: Playwright screenshots remain one execution tool rather than the top-level product model.

tools.label: Environment deployment
tools.reason: A generic local or Kubernetes deployment stage is planned but not yet wired into the runner.
details: This will become the shared path for local, minikube, and k3s-backed execution.

tools.label: Implementation loop
tools.reason: Implementation retries are available, but the current config keeps this stage disabled.
details: QA failures can feed directly back into the next bounded implementation attempt.

tools.label: QA verification
tools.reason: The runner can now execute a bounded QA bundle before evidence capture completes the lane.
details: The default QA bundle runs typecheck, the deterministic code test suite, and generated Playwright specs when a source enables them.

tools.label: Evidence reporting
tools.reason: Every run produces summaries and machine-readable manifests.
details: Reports become distribution inputs for destinations like Linear and GitHub.

tools.label: Linear publishing
tools.reason: Linear publishing is planned, but config currently disables it.
details: Intended to carry the parent issue for BDD, AC, and TDD structure.

reviewNotes: Linear publishing is part of the plan, but it is inactive until config.linear.enabled is turned on.

linear.issueTitle: IDD: Create a baseline for the deterministic screenshot library for the built-in surface library.

warnings: Linear publishing is part of the plan, but it is inactive until config.linear.enabled is turned on.

stages.label: Prompt Interpretation
stages.description: Bound the raw prompt to intent type, source scope, and capture hints before planning.

stages.label: Linear Scoping
stages.description: Shape the work into resumable Linear-owned lanes before execution planning expands.

stages.label: BDD Planning
stages.description: Refine the business intent, acceptance criteria, and scenarios after prompt interpretation.

stages.label: TDD Planning
stages.description: Translate the accepted scenarios into Playwright-first executable test artifacts.

stages.label: Implementation
stages.description: Apply the planned changes against the scoped source workspace.

stages.label: QA Verification
stages.description: Verify implementation output, tests, and evidence before completion or retry.
warnings: QA verification configuration is recorded and executes during source runs after implementation completes.
